items.title: Java News Roundup: Value Objects, WildFly 41, TornadoVM, LangChain4j, Oracle AI Agent Studio
items.summaryShort: Java News Roundup: Value Objects, WildFly 41, TornadoVM, LangChain4j, Oracle AI Agent Studio. This week's Java roundup for July 13th, 2026, features news highlighting: a reintroduction of Value Objects (Preview); the GA release of WildFly 4

items.title: DoorDash Uses Envoy and Valkey for a 1.5M RPS Proxy Cache with 99.99999% Availability
items.summaryShort: DoorDash Uses Envoy and Valkey for a 1.5M RPS Proxy Cache with 99.99999% Availability. DoorDash has developed Entity Cache, a transparent proxy caching platform built on Envoy and Valkey to reduce redundant service-to-service requests acros

items.title: Three InfoQ Certification Cohorts Start This August: Meet the Facilitators
items.summaryShort: Three InfoQ Certification Cohorts Start This August: Meet the Facilitators. InfoQ has opened enrollment for three five-week online certification cohorts starting in August, each led by a senior practitioner applying QCon talk frameworks to

items.title: Presentation: Platform Engineering for Everyone - Success Can’t Be Coded
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Platform Engineering for Everyone - Success Can’t Be Coded. Max Korbacher explains why successful internal development platforms cannot be built on tech alone.

items.title: Podcast: Strands Agents with Clare Liguori
items.summaryShort: Podcast: Strands Agents with Clare Liguori. Thomas Betts talks with Clare Liguori, the technical lead on the open source Strands Agents SDK.

items.title: Anthropic's landmark $1.5B copyright settlement is approved
items.summaryShort: Anthropic's landmark $1.5B copyright settlement is approved. The final approval settles one case, but it doesn't resolve the broader issue of using copyrighted works to train AI models.

items.title: Colossal Biosciences reportedly in talks to raise new capital at $20B–$30B valuation
items.summaryShort: Colossal Biosciences reportedly in talks to raise new capital at $20B–$30B valuation. The de-extinction startup is looking to double or triple its previous valuation, according to the report.

items.title: Trump's latest AI czar has already resigned
items.summaryShort: Trump's latest AI czar has already resigned. The director role for the Center for AI Standards and Innovation (CAISI) has become a revolving door since David Sacks left his position as czar.
